nodes.label: AI as supplement to creative process
nodes.label_negative: AI as cliché and sanitized generator
nodes.grounding_span: The AI model can come up with interesting things that I hadn't considered

nodes.label: AI as efficiency tool
nodes.label_negative: AI as threat to authentic human creativity
nodes.grounding_span: The advantage of using AI is that it makes the whole process a lot faster

nodes.label: Human-driven creative agency
nodes.grounding_span: I'm the one driving the process

nodes.label: AI-generated content quality and validity
nodes.label_negative: Human-created art as warm, nuanced, and enriching
nodes.grounding_span: A lot of the content it generates is 'good enough'

nodes.label: Creative authenticity and human expression
nodes.grounding_span: hand edited to sound more like my authentic voice as an artist

nodes.label: Productivity and efficiency
nodes.grounding_span: it makes the whole process a lot faster

nodes.label: Human artistic expression
nodes.grounding_span: Things that are created by a human are warmer, more beautiful, more nuanced, complex, difficult and enriching

nodes.label: Satisfaction with AI as collaborative partner
nodes.grounding_span: I really enjoyed the process of generating the statement

nodes.label: Frustration with AI's lack of personal voice
nodes.grounding_span: The version that the AI generated didn't sound much like me though. It sounded cliché and sanitised

nodes.label: Resistance to AI in creative work
nodes.grounding_span: I do have a concern that people will become creatively lazy

nodes.label: Commitment to collaborative creative process
nodes.grounding_span: I won't let it replace my own creativity - that would be very unsatisfying

nodes.label: Collaborative iterative refinement — works back and forth with AI
nodes.grounding_span: I could ask for different versions of the statement, fine-tuning it by adding and subtracting different elements

nodes.label: Collaborative curation — selects and builds upon AI outputs
nodes.grounding_span: Then it's up to me to decide if I want to keep them, or if I want to change them in some way to fit my purposes
